title: gilibertia listeri
intro: Gilibertia listeri is a plant species native to New Zealand, also known as "Gilibertia" or "New Zealand broom". It is a shrub that belongs to the Apiaceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which have been shown to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Gilibertia listeri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in creams and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
